overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-budget action game depicting a hooded protagonist walking along a stone terrace overlooking a historic Middle Eastern city. The character moves slowly past architectural columns and a burning brazier while the camera maintains a smooth follow shot, revealing domed buildings and palm trees in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone terrace with support columns and hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the terrace, approaching a burning brazier and an NPC

notable_agents.action: standing stationary near a burning brazier, wearing dark robes

dark green fabric banner hanging between columns
tall metal stand holding a burning fire
non-player character standing near the brazier

tall palm trees visible in the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high stone terrace with large cylindrical columns on the right. A hooded character walks forward past a burning brazier where an NPC stands stationary. Green banners hang between the columns, and wooden scaffolding is visible far below on the left. The ground is paved with light-colored stone tiles, and palm trees are visible in the distant hazy cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace edge with panoramic city overlook

events.description: moving past the columns and brazier to the open terrace edge with expanded city view

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the terrace edge, overlooking the sprawling city below

entered.detail: dense cluster of sand-colored buildings stretching to the horizon
distinctive building with bright blue dome standing out in the cityscape
low stone wall marking the edge of the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the columns to the open edge of the terrace, revealing a panoramic view of the historic city below. The NPC and brazier are left behind as the camera focuses on the sprawling skyline with a distinctive blue-domed building visible in the distance. Palm trees and wooden scaffolding become more prominent on the left as the character approaches the stone railing at the terrace edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high stone terrace that transitions from a sheltered architectural walkway into a wide panoramic vista of a historic city. It begins by following a hooded character past large cylindrical columns and a burning brazier where a stationary NPC stands, with green banners fluttering overhead. As the character moves forward, the camera leaves the columns and the brazier behind, shifting focus toward the open edge of the terrace. The scene then expands to reveal a sprawling skyline featuring a distinctive blue-domed building and distant palm trees, while wooden scaffolding becomes more prominent on the left. Finally, the perspective opens fully as the character approaches the stone railing, unveiling the full scale of the hazy cityscape below.
